name: @agent-tool-lite/search
description: Glob and Grep agent tools via @vscode/ripgrep (bundled rg binary), aligned with Claude Code behavior subset

scripts.test: npm run build && tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && node --test test-dist/glob-files.test.js test-dist/build-grep-args.test.js test-dist/run-ripgrep.test.js test-dist/glob-tool.test.js test-dist/grep-tool.test.js test-dist/ignore-file-watch.test.js
